title: CLAUDE.md
text: file provides guidance Claude Code (claude.ai/code) working code repository.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: pgatouR — R client PGA Tour’s GraphQL REST APIs. Ships tidy tibbles. Package name DESCRIPTION pgatouR (case-sensitive). Repo directory lowercase pgatour.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Run package root R (via Rscript -e '...'): Tests use testthat 3e (edition 3). currently test-utils.R covering helpers; network-hitting functions unit-tested.
code: devtools::document()          # regenerate NAMESPACE + man/ from roxygen devtools::load_all()          # iterate without installing devtools::test()              # run all testthat tests testthat::test_file("tests/testthat/test-utils.R")   # single test file devtools::check()             # full R CMD check devtools::install()           # install locally source("data-raw/stat_ids.R") # rebuild bundled stat_ids dataset pkgdown::build_site()         # build docs site (CI also does this)

title: CLAUDE.md
text: R/utils-api.R single chokepoint network /O: pga_graphql_request(operation_name, variables) — POSTs https://orchestrator.pgatour.com/graphql, loads query text inst/graphql/<operation_name>.graphql, sends x-api-key header (public key embedded PGA Tour frontend), throttles 10 req/sec via req_throttle, returns data field. GraphQL errors HTTP ≥400 abort cli_abort. pga_rest_request(path) — GETs https://data-api.pgatour.com/<path>, throttling, returns parsed JSON. Query strings cached .pga_cache environment, keyed operation name, .graphql file read disk per session. Every user-facing pga_*() function R/ thin wrapper: call pga_graphql_request / pga_rest_request, shape result tibble. Add new endpoints dropping .graphql file inst/graphql/ whose stem matches operationName, calling pga_graphql_request("YourOpName", list(...)).

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Several GraphQL operations (ending Compressed, e.g. LeaderboardCompressedV3, ScorecardCompressedV3, shotDetailsV4Compressed, TeeTimesCompressedV2, CurrentLeadersCompressed, oddsToWinCompressed) return payload string base64-encoded gzip JSON. Pass pga_decompress() R/utils-decompress.R parsing. pga_decompress uses jsonlite::fromJSON(..., simplifyVector = TRUE), parsed$players etc. come back data.frame/matrix, list--lists — flattening code (see R/leaderboard.R) depends shape.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: R/utils-parse.R: - to_snake_case() / clean_names() — convert API camelCase snake_case columns. - validate_tour_code() — "R" (PGA), "S" (Champions), "H" (Korn Ferry) valid. - safe_pluck(x, ...) — nested list access returns NULL instead erroring; used heavily reshaping heterogeneous API responses. %||% (base R 4.4+, package Depends: R (>= 4.1.0)) used throughout — ’s unavailable minimum R version, surface check failure.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: data/stat_ids.rda (built data-raw/stat_ids.R, ~340-row tribble stat metadata) exposed stat_ids dataset. adding/renaming stats, edit data-raw/stat_ids.R re-source usethis::use_data(overwrite = TRUE) rewrites .rda.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: Roughly one file per endpoint family (R/leaderboard.R, R/scorecard.R, R/shot_details.R, R/stats.R, R/schedule.R, R/player_profile.R, R/players.R, R/tournaments.R, R/news.R, R/videos.R, R/odds.R, R/coverage.R, R/tee_times.R, R/fedex_cup.R, R/scorecard_comparison.R, R/current_leaders.R). Exports driven roxygen @export tags — edit roxygen, run devtools::document() regenerate NAMESPACE man/.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: pgatour_api_docs.md repo root primary reference upstream API’s shape available operations — consult inventing field names adding new endpoints.

title: CLAUDE.md
text: .github/workflows/pkgdown.yaml installs package builds pkgdown site pushes. _pkgdown.yml configures site (deployed https://walrusquant.github.io/pgatouR/). pgatour_api_docs.md, data-raw/, .github/, .claude/ excluded built package via .Rbuildignore.

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
code: devtools::install_github("WalrusQuant/pgatouR") library(pgatouR)

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: functions need tournament ID. follow format {tour_code}{year}{number}: "R2026475" — 2026 Valspar Championship (PGA Tour) "R2026003" — 2026 Sentry (PGA Tour) "S2026003" — Champions Tour event can find PGA Tour URLs using pga_schedule() list tournaments season: tour code prefix tells tour:
code: # Full season schedule with dates, purse, course, champion pga_schedule(2026) #> # A tibble: 48 × 15 #>    tournament_id tournament_name       display_date status    purse     ... #>    <chr>         <chr>                 <chr>        <chr>     <chr>     ... #>  1 R2026006      Sony Open in Hawaii   Jan 15 - 18  COMPLETED $9,100,000 #>  2 R2026002      The American Express  Jan 22 - 25  COMPLETED $9,200,000 #>  3 R2026004      Farmers Insurance Op… Jan 29 - F…  COMPLETED $9,600,000 #>  ...

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: leaderboard starting point tournament. returns every player field scores. quick snapshot just top 15, use pga_current_leaders():
code: lb <- pga_leaderboard("R2026475") lb #> # A tibble: 135 × 17 #>    player_id first_name last_name display_name  country position total thru #>    <chr>     <chr>      <chr>     <chr>         <chr>   <chr>    <chr> <chr> #>  1 39971     Sungjae    Im        Sungjae Im    KOR     1        -7    F* #>  2 27064     Brandt     Snedeker  Brandt Snede… USA     2        -6    F #>  3 56630     Davis      Thompson  Davis Thomps… USA     T3       -5    F #>  4 39997     Jordan     Spieth    Jordan Spieth USA     T3       -5    7 #>  ... pga_current_leaders("R2026475")

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: See ’s grouped together tee : Tee times returned proper POSIXct timestamps tournament’s local timezone.
code: tt <- pga_tee_times("R2026475") tt #> # A tibble: 270 × 12 #>    round_number tee_time            start_tee display_name    group_number #>           <int> <dttm>                  <int> <chr>                  <int> #>  1            1 2026-03-19 07:35:00         1 Alex Smalley               1 #>  2            1 2026-03-19 07:35:00         1 Justin Lower               1 #>  3            1 2026-03-19 07:35:00         1 Max McGreevy               1 #>  ...

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: Get full picture — name, location, dates, format, current weather: courses column list-column containing tibble course details tournament.
code: t <- pga_tournaments("R2026475") t$tournament_name #> "Valspar Championship"  t$weather_condition #> "DAY_PARTLY_CLOUDY"  t$weather_temp_f #> "73°F"

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: See ’s live ’s coming :
code: pga_coverage("R2026475") #> # A tibble: 16 × 7 #>    coverage_type          stream_title            round_number live_status #>    <chr>                  <chr>                          <int> <chr> #>  1 BroadcastFullTelecast  Round 1 - Broadcast                1 LIVE #>  2 BroadcastFullTelecast  Main Feed                          2 UPCOMING #>  3 BroadcastFeaturedGroup Marquee Group - S. Ry…             2 UPCOMING #>  ...

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
code: odds <- pga_odds("R2026475") odds #> # A tibble: 135 × 5 #>    player_id odds    odds_sort odds_direction option_id #>    <chr>     <chr>       <dbl> <chr>          <chr> #>  1 34046     +650          7.5 UP             18776 #>  2 36689     +6000        61   DOWN           18776 #>  ...

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: Get player’s hole--hole results. row one hole one round: status column gives result hole (EAGLE, BIRDIE, PAR, BOGEY, etc.), round_score running score relative par.
code: sc <- pga_scorecard("R2026475", "39971") sc #> # A tibble: 18 × 11 #>    round_number hole_number   par score status yardage round_score #>           <int>       <int> <int> <chr> <chr>    <int> <chr> #>  1            1          10     4 3     BIRDIE     437 -1 #>  2            1          11     5 3     EAGLE      561 -3 #>  3            1          12     4 3     BIRDIE     370 -4 #>  ...

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: granular data available — every shot player hits, distances, play--play descriptions, coordinate data visualization: response includes coordinate columns (prefixed leftToRightCoords bottomToTopCoords) containing x, y, tourcastX, tourcastY, tourcastZ values positions stroke. can used plot shot patterns course map.
code: shots <- pga_shot_details("R2026475", "39971", round = 1) shots #> # A tibble: 65 × 15+ #>    hole_number stroke_number play_by_play                        distance #>          <int>         <int> <chr>                               <chr> #>  1          10             1 303 yds to left tree outline, 136…  303 yds #>  2          10             2 134 yds to left green, 10 ft 2 in… 134 yds #>  3          10             3 In the hole                         10 ft 2 in. #>  ...

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: Get video clips specific player tournament: Note: pga_videos() takes numeric tournament ID ("475") without tour code prefix, functions use full ID ("R2026475"). shot--shot video clips (one clip per stroke round):
code: pga_videos(player_ids = "39971", tournament_id = "475") #> # A tibble: 18 × 17 #>    title                                  duration_secs hole_number pub_date #>    <chr>                                          <int> <chr>       <dttm> #>  1 Sungjae Im hits 117-yard approach to…             25 5           2026-03-19 16:42:12 #>  2 Sungjae Im sinks 44-foot birdie putt…             16 3           2026-03-19 16:05:19 #>  ... pga_tourcast_videos("R2026475", "39971", round = 1)

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: player profile endpoints give deep dive player — REST endpoints don’t require GraphQL.

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
code: profile <- pga_player_profile("52955")  # Ludvig Aberg profile$first_name   # "Ludvig" profile$country      # "Sweden" profile$age          # "26" profile$college      # "Texas Tech University"  # Career highlights: wins, FedExCup rank, world rank profile$highlights #> # A tibble: 6 × 3 #>    title                   value subtitle #>    <chr>                   <chr> <chr> #>  1 PGA TOUR Wins           2     NA #>  2 Wins (2026)             0     NA #>  3 FedExCup Standings      11    PTS: 685 #>  4 World Rank (OWGR)       17    NA #>  ...  # Quick overview stats (career, season, bio, performance) profile$overview

what: Player Stats (131 Stats in One Call)
title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: one powerful endpoints — player’s full stat profile ranks:
code: stats <- pga_player_stats("52955") #> # A tibble: 131 × 11 #>    stat_id title                rank  value  category #>    <chr>   <chr>                <chr> <chr>  <chr> #>  1 02675   SG: Total            13    1.245  STROKES_GAINED, SCORING #>  2 02674   SG: Tee-to-Green     12    1.150  STROKES_GAINED, DRIVING #>  3 02567   SG: Off-the-Tee      29    0.460  STROKES_GAINED, DRIVING #>  4 02568   SG: Approach the Gr… 23    0.508  STROKES_GAINED, APPROACH #>  ...

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
code: results <- pga_player_results("52955") results[, c("tournament", "pos", "total", "to_par", "winnings")] #> # A tibble: 6 × 5 #>    tournament                 pos   total to_par winnings #>    <chr>                      <chr> <chr> <chr>  <chr> #>  1 The American Express       W/D   135   -9     $- #>  2 Farmers Insurance Open     CUT   150   +6     $- #>  3 AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am   T37   277   -11    $78,375 #>  4 The Genesis Invitational   T20   275   -9     $259,500 #>  5 Arnold Palmer Invitational T3    276   -12    $1,200,000 #>  6 THE PLAYERS Championship   T5    279   -9     $925,000

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
code: # Career achievements pga_player_career("52955")  # Biographical text and amateur highlights bio <- pga_player_bio("52955") bio$text  # Character vector of bio paragraphs length(bio$amateur_highlights)  # 19 amateur achievements  # Is a player in the current tournament? pga_player_tournament_status("39971")  # Sungjae Im #> # A tibble: 1 × 11 #>    player_id tournament_name      position thru  score total #>    <chr>     <chr>                <chr>    <chr> <chr> <chr> #>  1 39971     Valspar Championship 1        F     -7    -7

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: pgatouR gives access 300+ PGA Tour statistics going back 2004. Every stat unique ID: result includes metadata attributes:
code: # Strokes Gained: Total sg <- pga_stats("02675") sg #> # A tibble: 195 × 7+ #>     rank player_name       country          ... #>    <int> <chr>             <chr>            ... #>  1     1 Jacob Bridgeman   United States    ... #>  2     2 Jake Knapp        United States    ... #>  3     3 Scottie Scheffler United States    ... #>  ... attr(sg, "stat_title")       # "SG: Total" attr(sg, "stat_description") # Full description text attr(sg, "tour_avg")         # "0.000" attr(sg, "year")             # 2026

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: package includes bundled stat_ids dataset 340 known stat IDs:
code: # All strokes gained stats stat_ids[stat_ids$category == "Strokes Gained", ] #> # A tibble: 6 × 4 #>   stat_id stat_name              category       subcategory #>   <chr>   <chr>                  <chr>          <chr> #> 1 02675   SG: Total              Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 2 02674   SG: Tee-to-Green       Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 3 02567   SG: Off-the-Tee        Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 4 02568   SG: Approach the Green Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 5 02569   SG: Around-the-Green   Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 6 02564   SG: Putting            Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders  # Search by name stat_ids[grep("Driving Distance", stat_ids$stat_name), ]  # See all categories unique(stat_ids$category) #> "Strokes Gained"    "Off The Tee"       "Approach the Green" #> "Around the Green"  "Putting"           "Scoring" #> "Streaks"           "Money/Finishes"    "Points/Rankings"

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: Pull stat across multiple years:
code: dd_2026 <- pga_stats("101", year = 2026)  # Driving Distance dd_2020 <- pga_stats("101", year = 2020) dd_2015 <- pga_stats("101", year = 2015)

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: ones ’ll probably use :

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: Get full season schedule dates, purse, course info, champions, FedExCup points:
code: schedule <- pga_schedule(2026) schedule #> # A tibble: 48 × 15 #>    tournament_id tournament_name       display_date status    purse #>    <chr>         <chr>                 <chr>        <chr>     <chr> #>  1 R2026006      Sony Open in Hawaii   Jan 15 - 18  COMPLETED $9,100,000 #>  2 R2026002      The American Express  Jan 22 - 25  COMPLETED $9,200,000 #>  ...  # See champions and earnings for completed events schedule[schedule$status == "COMPLETED",          c("tournament_name", "champion", "champion_earnings")]  # Use tournament IDs with other functions pga_leaderboard("R2026006")  # Past seasons work too pga_schedule(2025)

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
code: fc <- pga_fedex_cup(2026) fc #> # A tibble: 192 × 14 #>    display_name      this_week_rank projected_points ... #>    <chr>             <chr>          <chr>            ... #>  1 Jacob Bridgeman   1              1,403.981        ... #>  2 Cameron Young     2              1,323.014        ... #>  3 Akshay Bhatia     3              1,224.306        ... #>  ...

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: full player directory 2,400+ players across tours:
code: players <- pga_players("R") nrow(players) #> 2486  # Filter to active players active <- players[players$is_active, ] nrow(active)  # Other tours champions <- pga_players("S") korn_ferry <- pga_players("H")

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
code: # Latest articles news <- pga_news(limit = 10) news[, c("headline", "publish_date", "franchise_display_name")]  # See available categories pga_news_franchises() #> # A tibble: 7 × 2 #>   franchise        franchise_label #>   <chr>            <chr> #> 1 latest           Latest #> 2 power-rankings   Power Rankings #> 3 expert-picks     Expert Picks #> 4 equipment-report Equipment #> 5 tour-insider     Tour Insider #> 6 needtoknow       Need to Know #> 7 daily-wrapup     Daily Wrap Up  # Filter by category pga_news(franchises = "power-rankings", limit = 5)

title: Getting Started with pgatouR
text: Rate limiting built 10 requests/second. don’t need add delays. Compressed payloads (leaderboards, scorecards, tee times, shot details, odds) decompressed automatically. always get clean tibble. Error messages use cli package tell exactly went wrong (bad tournament ID, API errors, etc.). stat_ids lazy-loaded — just type stat_ids access , data() call needed. @return section function’s help page (?pga_leaderboard) describes exact columns ’ll get back.

what: R Client for the PGA Tour API
title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
text: R client PGA Tour API. Access leaderboards, player stats, scorecards, shot tracking data, tee times, FedExCup standings, betting odds, broadcast schedules, news, video highlights — returned tidy tibbles.

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
code: # Install from GitHub devtools::install_github("WalrusQuant/pgatouR")

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
code: library(pgatouR)  # Current leaderboard pga_leaderboard("R2026475")  # Strokes Gained: Total rankings pga_stats("02675")  # Full player directory (2,400+ players) pga_players()  # Hole-by-hole scorecard pga_scorecard("R2026475", "39971")  # Shot-level tracking with coordinates pga_shot_details("R2026475", "39971", round = 1)  # Full season schedule with dates, purse, champions pga_schedule(2025)

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
text: Tournament IDs follow format {tour_code}{year}{tournament_number}, e.g., "R2026475" 2026 Valspar Championship PGA Tour. can find tournament IDs PGA Tour website URL checking leaderboard/schedule pages. pga_tournaments() function can retrieve metadata known IDs.

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
code: library(pgatouR)  # Full profile overview profile <- pga_player_profile("52955")  # Ludvig Aberg profile$first_name  # "Ludvig" profile$highlights  # tibble: PGA TOUR Wins, FedExCup rank, World Rank profile$overview    # tibble: career/season/bio/stats summary  # 131 stats in one call (way faster than pulling individually) stats <- pga_player_stats("52955") stats[stats$stat_id == "02675", ]  # SG: Total — rank 13, value 1.245  # Tournament results this season results <- pga_player_results("52955") results[, c("tournament", "pos", "total", "to_par", "winnings")]  # Career achievements pga_player_career("52955")  # Bio and amateur highlights bio <- pga_player_bio("52955") bio$text  # paragraphs of biographical text  # Is a player in the current tournament? pga_player_tournament_status("39971")  # Sungjae Im — position, score, thru

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
code: library(pgatouR)  # Get all six strokes gained categories sg_total <- pga_stats("02675")        # SG: Total sg_ott   <- pga_stats("02567")        # SG: Off-the-Tee sg_app   <- pga_stats("02568")        # SG: Approach sg_arg   <- pga_stats("02569")        # SG: Around-the-Green sg_putt  <- pga_stats("02564")        # SG: Putting  # Check what stat you just pulled attr(sg_total, "stat_title") #> "SG: Total"  attr(sg_total, "tour_avg") #> "0.000"

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
code: # Browse the stat_ids dataset stat_ids[stat_ids$category == "Putting", ]  # Search by name stat_ids[grep("Driving", stat_ids$stat_name), ]  # All strokes gained stats stat_ids[stat_ids$category == "Strokes Gained", ]

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
code: # Driving distance over the years dd_2024 <- pga_stats("101", year = 2024) dd_2020 <- pga_stats("101", year = 2020) dd_2015 <- pga_stats("101", year = 2015)  # FedExCup standings from past seasons pga_fedex_cup(2025) pga_fedex_cup(2024)  # Full season schedule with dates, purse, course, champion schedule_2025 <- pga_schedule(2025) schedule_2026 <- pga_schedule(2026)  # 48 events, future events included

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
code: # Full tournament picture tournament  <- pga_tournaments("R2026475") leaderboard <- pga_leaderboard("R2026475") tee_times   <- pga_tee_times("R2026475") coverage    <- pga_coverage("R2026475") odds        <- pga_odds("R2026475")  # Deep dive on a player player_id <- "39971"  # Sungjae Im scorecard  <- pga_scorecard("R2026475", player_id) shots      <- pga_shot_details("R2026475", player_id, round = 1) videos     <- pga_tourcast_videos("R2026475", player_id, round = 1)

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
code: # Get all PGA Tour players players <- pga_players("R")  # Filter to active players active <- players[players$is_active, ]  # Korn Ferry Tour players kft_players <- pga_players("H")

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
code: # Latest news news <- pga_news(limit = 10)  # News by category categories <- pga_news_franchises() power_rankings <- pga_news(franchises = "power-rankings", limit = 5)  # Player highlights videos <- pga_videos(player_ids = "46046", tournament_id = "475")

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
text: stat_ids dataset covers 340 stats across categories: Strokes Gained — Total, Tee--Green, --Tee, Approach, Around--Green, Putting Tee — Driving distance, accuracy, ball speed, club head speed, launch angle, spin rate Approach Green — GIR, proximity hole (distance bucket, fairway/rough), going Around Green — Scrambling, sand saves, proximity (distance lie) Putting — Putting average, putts per round, make rates distance (3’ 25’+), GIR putting Scoring — Scoring average, birdies, eagles, bogey avoidance, par 3/4/5 scoring, round, front/back 9 Streaks — Consecutive cuts, fairways, GIR, birdies, rounds 60s Money/Finishes — Official money, career earnings, top 10s, victories Points/Rankings — FedExCup, world ranking, power/accuracy/putting ratings

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
text: package wraps PGA Tour’s GraphQL REST APIs: GraphQL endpoint: https://orchestrator.pgatour.com/graphql REST endpoint: https://data-api.pgatour.com Authentication: Uses public API key embedded PGA Tour frontend (user authentication required) Rate limiting: Built-throttling 10 requests/second Several endpoints return gzip+base64 compressed payloads. package handles decompression transparently.

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
text: httr2 — HTTP requests jsonlite — JSON parsing base64 decoding tibble — Tidy data frames cli — User-friendly error messages

title: R Client for the PGA Tour API
text: MIT

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: Reverse-engineered pgatour.com network traffic (HAR captures). Captured: 2026-03-19

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
code: POST https://orchestrator.pgatour.com/graphql Content-Type: application/json

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: Without x-api-key x-pgat-platform, endpoint returns HTTP 503.

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: Several operations return compressed payloads. decode:
code: import base64, gzip, json  payload = response['data']['operationName']['payload'] decoded = base64.b64decode(payload) decompressed = gzip.decompress(decoded) data = json.loads(decompressed)

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: Broadcast/streaming info tournament Variables: Query:
code: {   "tournamentId": "R2026475" } query Coverage($tournamentId: ID!) { coverage(tournamentId: $tournamentId) { id tournamentName countryCode coverageType { ... on BroadcastAudioStream { __typename id streamTitle roundNumber channelTitle roundDisplay startTime endTime liveStatus network { id networkName backgroundColor backgroundColorDark networkLogo networkLogoDark priorityNum url iOSLink appleAppStore androidLink googlePlayStore simulcast simulcastUrl streamUrl iosStreamUrl androidStreamUrl } } ... on BroadcastFullTelecast { __typename id streamTitle roundNumber channelTitle roundDisplay startTime endTime promoImage promoImages liveStatus network { id networkName backgroundColor backgroundColorDark networkLogo networkLogoDark priorityNum url iOSLink appleAppStore androidLink googlePlayStore simulcast simulcastUrl streamUrl iosStreamUrl androidStreamUrl } } ... on BroadcastFeaturedGroup { __typename id streamTitle roundNumber channelTitle roundDisplay startTime endTime courseId groups { id extendedCoverage playerLastNames liveStatus } promoImage promoImages liveStatus network { id networkName backgroundColor backgroundColorDark networkLogo networkLogoDark priorityNum url iOSLink appleAppStore androidLink googlePlayStore simulcast simulcastUrl streamUrl iosStreamUrl androidStreamUrl } } ... on BroadcastFeaturedHole { __typename id streamTitle roundNumber channelTitle roundDisplay startTime endTime courseId featuredHoles promoImage promoImages liveStatus network { id networkName backgroundColor backgroundColorDark networkLogo networkLogoDark priorityNum url iOSLink appleAppStore androidLink googlePlayStore simulcast simulcastUrl streamUrl iosStreamUrl androidStreamUrl } } ... on BroadcastCoverageCarousel { __typename carousel { ... on BroadcastFullTelecast { __typename id streamTitle roundNumber channelTitle roundDisplay startTime endTime promoImage promoImages liveStatus network { id networkName backgroundColor backgroundColorDark networkLogo networkLogoDark priorityNum url iOSLink appleAppStore androidLink googlePlayStore simulcast simulcastUrl streamUrl iosStreamUrl androidStreamUrl } } ... on BroadcastFeaturedGroup { __typename id streamTitle roundNumber channelTitle roundDisplay startTime endTime courseId groups { id extendedCoverage playerLastNames liveStatus } promoImage promoImages liveStatus network { id networkName backgroundColor backgroundColorDark networkLogo networkLogoDark priorityNum url iOSLink appleAppStore androidLink googlePlayStore simulcast simulcastUrl streamUrl iosStreamUrl androidStreamUrl } } ... on BroadcastFeaturedHole { __typename id streamTitle roundNumber channelTitle roundDisplay startTime endTime courseId featuredHoles promoImage promoImages liveStatus network { id networkName backgroundColor backgroundColorDark networkLogo networkLogoDark priorityNum url iOSLink appleAppStore androidLink googlePlayStore simulcast simulcastUrl streamUrl iosStreamUrl androidStreamUrl } } } } } }}

text: News articles list Variables: Query:
code: {   "franchises": [     ""   ],   "limit": 20,   "offset": 0,   "tour": "R" } query NewsArticles($tour: TourCode, $franchises: [String!], $playerIds: [ID!], $limit: Int, $offset: Int, $tags: [String!], $sectionName: String) { newsArticles( tour: $tour franchises: $franchises playerIds: $playerIds limit: $limit offset: $offset tags: $tags sectionName: $sectionName ) { articles { ...NewsArticleFragment } franchiseSponsors { franchise image label accessibilityText backgroundColor } integratedComponents { index partner } }}fragment NewsArticleFragment on NewsArticle { id analyticsTags contentTournamentIds dateTextOverride aiGenerated isLive headline teaserHeadline teaserContent articleImage url publishDate updateDate franchise franchiseDisplayName shareURL sponsor { name description logo image websiteUrl gam sponsorPrefix logoAsset { imageOrg imagePath } logoDarkAsset { imageOrg imagePath } } brightcoveId externalLinkOverride players { id name } teaserImageOverride author { firstName lastName } articleFormType}

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: PGA stat full player rankings (300+ stats) Variables: Query:
code: {   "tourCode": "R",   "statId": "02675",   "year": null,   "eventQuery": null } query StatDetails($tourCode: TourCode!, $statId: String!, $year: Int, $eventQuery: StatDetailEventQuery) { statDetails( tourCode: $tourCode statId: $statId year: $year eventQuery: $eventQuery ) { __typename tourCode year displaySeason statId statType tournamentPills { tournamentId displayName } yearPills { year displaySeason } statTitle statDescription tourAvg lastProcessed statHeaders statCategories { category displayName subCategories { displayName stats { statId statTitle } } } rows { ... on StatDetailsPlayer { __typename playerId playerName country countryFlag rank rankDiff rankChangeTendency stats { statName statValue color } } ... on StatDetailTourAvg { __typename displayName value } } sponsorLogo }}

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: Tee times groupings start tees Variables: Query: Decompressed Response Schema:
code: {   "teeTimesCompressedV2Id": "R2026475" } query TeeTimesCompressedV2($teeTimesCompressedV2Id: ID!) { teeTimesCompressedV2(id: $teeTimesCompressedV2Id) { id payload }} {   "__typename": "TeeTimesV2",   "id": "R2026475",   "courses": [{"id": "665", "courseName": "Innisbrook Resort and Golf Club - Copperhead Course"}],   "defaultRound": 1,   "rounds": [{     "roundInt": 1,     "roundDisplay": "R1",     "roundStatus": "IN_PROGRESS",     "groups": [{       "groupNumber": 1,       "teeTime": 1773920100000,       "startTee": 1,       "backNine": false,       "players": [{"id": "46340", "firstName": "Alex", "lastName": "Smalley", "displayName": "Alex Smalley", "country": "USA"}]     }]   }] }

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: FedExCup standings Variables: Query:
code: {   "tourCode": "R",   "id": "02671",   "year": 2026 } query TourCupSplit($tourCode: TourCode!, $id: String, $year: Int, $eventQuery: StatDetailEventQuery) { tourCupSplit(tourCode: $tourCode, id: $id, year: $year, eventQuery: $eventQuery) { ...TourCupSplitMeta fixedHeaders columnHeaders rankingsHeader rankEyebrow pointsEyebrow message partner partnerLink projectedPlayers { ...Player ...InfoRow } officialPlayers { ...Player ...InfoRow } yearPills { year displaySeason } winner { id rank firstName lastName displayName shortName countryFlag country earnings totals { label value } } }}fragment TourCupSplitMeta on TourCupSplit { id title detailCopy projectedTitle projectedLive season description logo logoAsset { imagePath imageOrg } options tournamentPills { tournamentId displayName }}fragment Player on TourCupCombinedPlayer { __typename id firstName lastName displayName shortName countryFlag country rankingData { projected official event movement movementAmount logo logoDark } pointData { projected official event movement movementAmount logo logoDark } projectedSort officialSort thisWeekRank previousWeekRank columnData tourBound}fragment InfoRow on TourCupCombinedInfo { logo logoDark text sortValue toolTip}

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: Shot--shot video clips player round Variables: Query:
code: {   "playerId": "39971",   "tournamentId": "R2026475",   "round": 1 } query TourcastVideos($tournamentId: ID!, $playerId: ID!, $round: Int!, $hole: Int, $shot: Int) { tourcastVideos( tournamentId: $tournamentId playerId: $playerId round: $round hole: $hole shot: $shot ) { ...VideoFragment }}fragment VideoFragment on Video { category categoryDisplayName created description descriptionNode { ... on NewsArticleText { __typename value } ... on NewsArticleLink { __typename segments { type value data id format { variants } imageOrientation imageDescription } } } duration franchise franchiseDisplayName holeNumber id playerVideos { firstName id lastName shortName } poster pubdate roundNumber shareUrl shotNumber startsAt endsAt thumbnailAsset { imageOrg imagePath } thumbnail title tournamentId tourCode year accountId gamAccountId videoAccountId seqHoleNumber sponsor { name description logoPrefix logo logoDark image websiteUrl gam } pinned contentTournamentId}

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: Tournament metadata, weather, courses Variables: Query:
code: {   "ids": [     "R2026475"   ] } query Tournaments($ids: [ID!]) { tournaments(ids: $ids) { ...TournamentFragment }}fragment TournamentFragment on Tournament { id tournamentName tournamentLogo tournamentLocation tournamentStatus roundStatusDisplay roundDisplay roundStatus roundStatusColor currentRound timezone pdfUrl seasonYear displayDate country state city scoredLevel howItWorks howItWorksPill howItWorksWebview events { id eventName leaderboardId } courses { id courseName courseCode hostCourse scoringLevel } weather { logo logoDark logoAccessibility tempF tempC condition windDirection windSpeedMPH windSpeedKPH precipitation humidity logoAsset { imageOrg imagePath } logoDarkAsset { imageOrg imagePath } } ticketsURL tournamentSiteURL formatType features conductedByLabel conductedByLink beautyImage hideRolexClock hideSov headshotBaseUrl rightRailConfig { imageUrl imageAltText buttonLink buttonText } shouldSubscribe ticketsEnabled useTournamentSiteURL beautyImageAsset { imageOrg imagePath } disabledScorecardTabs leaderboardTakeover tournamentCategoryInfo { type logoLight logoLightAsset { imageOrg imagePath } logoDark logoDarkAsset { imageOrg imagePath } label } tournamentLogoAsset { imageOrg imagePath }}

title: PGA Tour GraphQL API Documentation
text: Player video highlights Variables: Query:
code: {   "tourCode": "R",   "playerIds": [     "39971"   ],   "season": "2026",   "tournamentId": "475",   "franchises": [     "competition#highlights",     "competition#extended-highlights",     "competition#interviews",     "competition#shot-of-the-day",     "competition#round-recaps"   ],   "limit": 18 } query Videos($tournamentId: String, $playerIds: [String!], $category: String, $franchise: String, $franchises: [String!], $tourCode: TourCode, $season: String, $limit: Int, $offset: Int, $holeNumber: String, $rating: Int) { videos( tournamentId: $tournamentId playerIds: $playerIds category: $category franchise: $franchise franchises: $franchises tourCode: $tourCode season: $season limit: $limit offset: $offset holeNumber: $holeNumber rating: $rating ) { ...VideoFragment }}fragment VideoFragment on Video { category categoryDisplayName created description descriptionNode { ... on NewsArticleText { __typename value } ... on NewsArticleLink { __typename segments { type value data id format { variants } imageOrientation imageDescription } } } duration franchise franchiseDisplayName holeNumber id playerVideos { firstName id lastName shortName } poster pubdate roundNumber shareUrl shotNumber startsAt endsAt thumbnailAsset { imageOrg imagePath } thumbnail title tournamentId tourCode year accountId gamAccountId videoAccountId seqHoleNumber sponsor { name description logoPrefix logo logoDark image websiteUrl gam } pinned contentTournamentId}

code: pga_videos(   player_ids = NULL,   tournament_id = NULL,   tour = "R",   season = NULL,   franchises = NULL,   limit = 18L,   offset = 0L )

title: Get player video highlights — pga_videos
text: player_ids Character vector NULL. Player IDs filter . tournament_id Character NULL. Tournament ID (numeric part , e.g., "475"). tour Character. Tour code. Defaults "R". season Character NULL. Season year string (e.g., "2026"). franchises Character vector NULL. Franchise filters (e.g., "competition#highlights"). limit Integer. Max videos. Defaults 18. offset Integer. Pagination offset. Defaults 0.

title: Get player video highlights — pga_videos
text: tibble videos.

title: Get player video highlights — pga_videos
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ pga_videos(player_ids = "39971", tournament_id = "475") } # }

what: pgatouR: R Client for the PGA Tour API — pgatouR-package
title: pgatouR: R Client for the PGA Tour API — pgatouR-package
text: Access PGA Tour leaderboards, player stats, scorecards, shot tracking data, tee times, FedExCup standings, odds, . Wraps PGA Tour GraphQL REST APIs, returning tidy tibbles.

title: pgatouR: R Client for the PGA Tour API — pgatouR-package
text: Maintainer: Adam Wickwire adam@adamwickwire.com

what: PGA Tour Stat ID Lookup Table — stat_ids
title: PGA Tour Stat ID Lookup Table — stat_ids
text: tibble containing known PGA Tour stat IDs, names, categories. Use pga_stats() look valid stat IDs.

title: PGA Tour Stat ID Lookup Table — stat_ids
code: stat_ids

title: PGA Tour Stat ID Lookup Table — stat_ids
text: tibble 4 columns: stat_id Character. stat ID pass pga_stats(). stat_name Character. Human-readable stat name. category Character. Top-level category (e.g., "Strokes Gained", "Putting"). subcategory Character. Subcategory (e.g., "Driving Leaders", "Putts per Round").

title: PGA Tour Stat ID Lookup Table — stat_ids
code: # Browse all strokes gained stats stat_ids[stat_ids$category == "Strokes Gained", ] #> # A tibble: 6 × 4 #>   stat_id stat_name              category       subcategory            #>   <chr>   <chr>                  <chr>          <chr>                  #> 1 02675   SG: Total              Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 2 02674   SG: Tee-to-Green       Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 3 02567   SG: Off-the-Tee        Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 4 02568   SG: Approach the Green Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 5 02569   SG: Around-the-Green   Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders #> 6 02564   SG: Putting            Strokes Gained Strokes Gained Leaders  # Find a stat by name stat_ids[grep("Driving Distance", stat_ids$stat_name), ] #> # A tibble: 2 × 4 #>   stat_id stat_name                     category    subcategory           #>   <chr>   <chr>                         <chr>       <chr>                 #> 1 101     Driving Distance              Off The Tee Driving Distance      #> 2 317     Driving Distance - All Drives Off The Tee Distance (All Drives)

title: pgatouR 0.1.0
text: Initial release.

title: pgatouR 0.1.0
text: pga_leaderboard() — Full leaderboard scores, positions, round--round results pga_current_leaders() — Quick top-15 snapshot -progress tournaments pga_tee_times() — Tee time groupings start tees player assignments pga_scorecard() — Hole--hole scorecard par, score, yardage, status pga_shot_details() — Shot--shot tracking data coordinates play--play pga_odds() — Betting odds win tournament field pga_coverage() — Broadcast streaming schedule

title: pgatouR 0.1.0
text: pga_stats() — 300+ stats full player rankings (2004-2026) pga_fedex_cup() — FedExCup standings projected official rankings pga_scorecard_comparison() — Head--head stat comparison players

title: pgatouR 0.1.0
text: pga_players() — Full player directory (2,400+ players across PGA Tour, Champions, Korn Ferry) pga_tournaments() — Tournament metadata including location, courses, weather, format pga_schedule() — Full season schedule dates, purse, course, champion, FedExCup points

title: pgatouR 0.1.0
text: pga_player_profile() — Overview career highlights, wins, earnings, world rank, bio basics pga_player_career() — Career achievements: starts, cuts, wins, finish distribution, earnings pga_player_results() — Tournament--tournament results round scores earnings pga_player_stats() — Full stat profile (131 stats ranks) single call pga_player_bio() — Biographical text amateur highlights pga_player_tournament_status() — Live tournament status currently playing

title: pgatouR 0.1.0
text: pga_news() — News articles filtering pagination pga_news_franchises() — Available news categories pga_videos() — Player video highlights pga_tourcast_videos() — Shot--shot video clips

title: pgatouR 0.1.0
text: stat_ids — Bundled lookup table 340 stat IDs names, categories, subcategories
